import React from 'react'; import { useWebSocket } from './hooks/useWebSocket'; import DashboardOverview from './components/DashboardOverview'; import QueryAnalytics from './components/QueryAnalytics'; import ProductionScore from './components/ProductionScore'; import { AgentRegistry } from './components/AgentRegistry'; import { SystemTerminal } from './components/SystemTerminal'; function App() { const { data, isConnected } = useWebSocket('ws://localhost:8000/ws'); return (
{/* Header */}

APEX.NEXUS

SYSTEM_TIME: 14:20:05
TELEMETRY: {isConnected ? 'ONLINE' : 'OFFLINE'}
{/* Main Content */}
{/* Left Column: KPIs & Analytics (3/4th width) */}
{/* Right Column: Agent Registry */}

AGENT_REGISTRY

TOTAL: {data?.agents?.length || 0}
{/* Footer Ticker */}
); } export default App;
